name: Helmer Directional Drilling Corp.
summary: Helmer Directional Drilling Corp., an exploration stage, engages in the acquisition, exploration, and development of mineral properties. It focuses on gold, silver, copper, iron, rare earth minerals, and other exploitable resources. The company has interests primarily in the Great Excelsior Mine that consists of 60 lode mining claims and is located in Whatcom County, the Mount Baker quadrangle, western Washington State. It also has interests in the Liver Peak property, which comprises 30 unpatented federal mining claims covering 620 acres and is located in the Lolo National Forest in Sanders County, Montana. The company is based in Wenatchee, Washington.
